name: Luce
description: Three rounds of a 1000m run, 10 muscle-ups, and 100 air squats — a running-anchored round with a large air-squat volume alongside a gymnastics skill.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/luce (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09; official Rx includes a 20 lb (men) / 14 lb (women) weight vest
